violations.description: Preventing contamination by consumers. — --Condiment was not properly protected from contamination. Container of salsa on customer self service counter not provided with lid.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Particle board shelf above countertop convection oven not properly sealed. Particle board cabinets showing wear, no longer maintaining seal.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
